productDisplayName: Puma Men Mn's Body Train Black Tshirts
description: CompositionBlack round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, that has ribbing around the neckline, short sleeves, white and pink graphic print and writing on the front and the back and printed cat logo on the back and on the left sleeve FittingRegularWash careGentle machine wash in cool water Use mild detergentDo not tumble dry, bleach or dry cleanUse warm ironBold and stylish, this black T-shirt from puma is perfect for everyday wear.
